title: Overpowered Suspicious Sand
body:
# Overpowered Suspicious Sand
![banner](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/tdwusUt9/images/d88fe3d69d819ffb1402b3f4458e2dd3f692e110.png)

This datapack makes suspicious sand really overpowered by overwriting the loot table.
It may contain loot of end cities, bastions and a lot of enchanted diamond / netherite items.
